title: Spicy Thai Mushroom Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired curry made with sautéed mushrooms and a blend of aromatic spices. Serve over steamed rice for a delicious and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Assorted varieties, such as cremini and shiitake

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Pour in coconut milk and stir to combine.
Add fish sauce, brown sugar, and palm sugar. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together, about 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with cilantro and serve over steamed rice.
